/not-so-open/facilities/jjm/.notes:
• Created by cleaning the data available at JJM.zip
  • some guesses were made while cleaning ill formatted school and anganwadi coordinates
  • any coordinate not in Indian boundary were dropped
  • only data which could be tracked to a village mapped to LGD was used
  • data related to habitations which couldn't be tracked to a single habitation id were dropped
